title: Pharmacological Characterization of Crotamine Effects on Mice Hind Limb Paralysis
author: Sunamita Lima
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.p7wdrpe

steps.instruction: Administer mouse infusions prior to placing them into the center of a open field arena (40 cm in diameter surrounded by 50 cm high walls, and with a bottom painted in white and designed as presented in the scheme below) in a brightly lit room.
Record the distance moved and time spent in the entire open field using the video tracking system and software, for 1 hour. 01:00:00
